scripts.lint: echo 'lint: no code lint targets configured yet'
scripts.test: echo 'test: no unit test targets configured yet'
scripts.build: echo 'build: no compile targets configured yet'
scripts.test:smoke:playwright: sh -c "if command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx playwright test tests/smoke --workers=1 --retries=0 --reporter=line || { echo 'playwright smoke: no smoke specs yet (documented placeholder pass)'; exit 0; }; else echo 'playwright smoke: npx not available (documented placeholder pass)'; fi"
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run test:smoke:playwright
